title: opilia celtidifolia
intro: Opilia celtidifolia, also known as Opilia, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Opiliaceae. Traditionally, Opilia has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Opilia include relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a wound-healing agent. Opilia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it has also been used in traditional medicine as a powder or tincture.
